info.name: Amadeus Returns a List of Air Traffic Reports.

params.name: cityCode
params.description: Code for the city following IATA standard. [IATA table codes](http://www.iata.org/publications/Pages/code-search.aspx) - e.g. BOS for Boston

params.name: period
params.description:
time period (year) of the statistics.

Year for which the statistic are requested following [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)

params.name: direction
params.description:
Use ARRIVING to have statistics on travelers coming to the city or DEPARTING for statistics on travelers leaving the city.

By default, statistics are given on travelers ARRIVING the city.

items.docs: Amadeus Returns a List of Air Traffic Reports.
